name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green bell pepper, seeded and chopped into chunks
1 scallion, with the top, chopped into large pieces
1/2 jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced (include seeds for a hotter salsa)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a food processor fitted with the metal blade.
2. Pulse until finely chopped but still in larger pieces.
3. Store the salsa in an airtight container in the refrigerator up to one week.
